source_message: Oracle OOS 06-16: B short, Reversal (swing-tier bear MSS), bias-ALIGNED bearish. Entry 30864.25 (09:56 1m bearish close — MSS-leg FVG retrace into 30883.75-30894.25, CE 30889, from the 08:24 swing bear MSS leg; 09:55 high tapped CE exactly + swept AS.H/NYAM.H). Stop 30896 (above FVG high 30894.25). TP1 LO.L 30783 (2.6R) / AS.L 30755 (3.4R); TP2 NYAM.L 30561.75 (9.5R, reached). Move: high 30869.75 @09:55 -> broke down 10:20 -> bottom NYAM.L 30561.75 @10:59.
